summary: Add Phase 0B local release smoke and documentation proving login, Radar Task UI, mock scan, opportunity, and MVP Spec flow.
acceptance_criteria: A deterministic no-network Phase 0B smoke path covers local admin auth helpers, Radar Task create/update/delete/read model behavior, mock scan request shape, existing opportunity flow readiness, and MVP Spec readiness.
README documents the Phase 0A/0B split, local-only admin gate, Radar Task UI workflow, fresh-checkout validation, and human-gated provider/deployment boundaries.
.env.example documents only placeholder local admin variables and no real secrets.
PROJECT_STATUS and goal-mode state record Phase 0B completion and no active machine-creatable tasks in the approved scope.
npm test, npm run build, taskctl validate, git diff --check, and the autonomous stop gate pass.
notes: This is the closing task for the approved Phase 0B autonomous scope.
If final stop gate blocks because additional approved work is machine-visible, create the next smallest task instead of stopping.
non_goals: No actual public deployment, CI/CD, DNS, store listing, paid provider, account creation, real secret, production auth, ownership model, billing, telemetry, cron, or email sending.
No runtime product code changes unless a release smoke defect is found and separately tasked.
